overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a cowboy character exploring the interior of an ornate Victorian mansion. The character ascends a grand staircase and walks through a richly decorated drawing room with a fireplace, passing an NPC standing near the doorway.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand staircase and upper hallway of ornate mansion

events.description: character enters the drawing room from the corridor, revealing fireplace and seating area

agents.ego_description: climbing the grand wooden staircase and walking along the upper hallway with ornate wall paneling

entered.detail: wide wooden staircase with dark banister ascending to upper floor
tall arched windows with colorful stained glass panels
white walls with decorative gold-framed rectangular moldings
dark polished wooden railing along the staircase and corridor
elaborate hanging light fixture visible at the end of the corridor

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a grand wooden staircase in a dimly lit mansion interior. Stained glass windows line the right wall while ornate white paneling with gold trim decorates the walls. The camera follows the character along the upper hallway toward a chandelier visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: upscale drawing room with fireplace and seating

events.description: lighting brightens as character enters room with lit fireplace and window light
character slows slightly while approaching the doorway where NPC is standing

agents.ego_description: walking through the drawing room toward the exit doorway, passing a gentleman standing by the wall

notable_agents.action: gentleman in red coat and hat standing stationary near the doorway, observing the room

entered.detail: white marble fireplace with fire burning and decorative items on the mantle
upholstered green sofa with tufted back positioned near the window
tall doorway with green curtains leading to the next room or corridor

segments.scene_description: The character enters a spacious drawing room with a lit fireplace on the left and a green sofa nearby. An NPC in a red coat stands by the right wall near a curtained doorway. The character walks across the red carpet toward the exit, passing the stationary gentleman as the ornate chandelier hangs overhead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the narrow, dimly lit corridors of a mansion's upper floor into a spacious, warmly lit drawing room. It begins by following the character up a grand wooden staircase, passing stained glass windows and ornate white paneling with gold trim. As the character moves along the upper hallway, the view opens toward a distant chandelier that leads the way into the next room. The scene then expands into a large drawing room where the lighting shifts to the glow of a lit fireplace and a green sofa, with the camera gliding across a red carpet. Finally, the character passes a stationary gentleman in a red coat standing by a curtained doorway before heading toward the exit.
